MARCTagCondition1: The record is not describing an aggregate manifestation
Justification for Mapping: Since transformation coding cannot tell whether a heading in an Associated added entry field is for a work vs an expression, or an aggregating work, a multi-part work, or a single-part work, we must use ‘has related work of manifestation’ as our default relationship between a described WEMI and an associated WEMI. We do this even if we have a Relator value that maps to an RDA URI.
Transformation Notes:
<ManifestationIRI> has related work of manifestation <$1>
<$1> rdawd:P10002 "stringified $0" .// has identifier for work
<$1> has AAP for Associated Work "value of a, d, f, g, k, l, m, n, o, p, r, s, t"

MARCTagCondition1: The record is not describing an aggregate manifestation
Transformation Notes:
<ManifestationIRI> has related work of manifestation <Associated WorkIRI>
<Associated WorkIRI> rdawd:P10002 "stringified $0" .// has identifier for work
<Associated WorkIRI> rdawd:P10002 "stringified $1" .// has identifier for work
<Associated WorkIRI> has AP for Associated Work <NomenIRI>
<NomenIRI> has nomen string "value of a, d, f, g, k, l, m, n, o, p, r, s, t" in order of appearance
<NomenIRI> has scheme of nomen <transform>
